description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ghcr.io/prefix-dev/pixi:latest Docker image with a global before_script installing texlive, texlive-xetex, texlive-fonts-extra and latexmk via apt-get, and sets DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive. Define a test job in the test stage that runs only for merge request events and executes "pixi run test", then "pixi run build", then "pixi run pdf". Define a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the default branch, runs "pixi run build" and "pixi run pdf", copies _build/latex/modern-cmake.pdf into _build/html/, and publishes the _build/html directory as GitLab Pages with an artifact that expires after one week.
